description: Whether MCP server configuration supports environment variable expansion. Reduces the need for hardcoded secrets in config files.

amp.mechanism: Amp MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

claude-code.mechanism: mcp_env_var_expansion: ${VAR} and ${VAR:-default} syntax in command, args, env, url, and headers fields of .mcp.json

cline.mechanism: Cline MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion syntax

codex.mechanism: Codex MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

factory-droid.mechanism: Factory Droid MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

gemini-cli.mechanism: env_variable_expansion: Gemini CLI MCP configuration supports environment variable expansion for secrets and paths

kiro.mechanism: Kiro MCP configuration does not document environment variable expansion

windsurf.mechanism: config_interpolation: Windsurf MCP configuration supports ${VAR} interpolation for environment variables
